title: JOB CONNECTION PROGRAM - 211info
text: SOUTHERN OREGON GOODWILL JACKSON COUNTY WORKFORCE DEVELOPMENT AND JOB CONNECTION JOB CONNECTION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides on-site computers, access to the internet, and other resources needed to search and apply for employment. 11 W Jackson Street Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-1pm drop-in services, 1:30pm-5pm by appointment only Email (541) 772-3300 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 772-3300 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, email, or check website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Jackson County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located downtown off of Central Avenue. Take a right off of Central Avenue onto Jackson Street and travel one block across the railroad tracks. Located on the left side of Jackson Street. Services: Career Counseling Comprehensive Disability Related Employment Programs Comprehensive Job Assistance Centers Displaced Worker Employment Programs Employment Transition Counseling Ex-Offender Employment Programs Job Finding Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - GOODWORKS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
